name: Cataracts - Cataract Surgery Procedure Query
description: **Ninth Procedure-resource phenotype.** Tests ability to find cataract patients via cataract surgery (lens extraction with intraocular lens placement). First **ophthalmologic-surgical** procedure type (DR fundoscopy was diagnostic-imaging).
prompt: Find patients who have undergone cataract surgery.

prompts.broad: Find Procedure resources for cataract surgery — the surgical procedure that removes a clouded lens and replaces it with an intraocular lens implant (IOL). The most commonly performed surgical procedure in the United States.
prompts.expert: I need to identify cataract patients via their surgical treatment. Search Procedure resources for cataract surgery — the operative removal of the crystalline lens with intraocular lens placement — coded in SNOMED CT. Cataract surgery is the definitive treatment and is highly specific to cataract disease; unlike many procedure codes, it is not commonly performed for other indications, so this is a reliable single-code surgical query.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with cataract surgery. **Ninth Procedure-resource phenotype** in suite (after CHD revasc, polysomnography, colonoscopy, prostate biopsy, EEG, chest X-ray, fundoscopy, oophorectomy/hysterectomy). First ophthalmologic-surgical type.
